raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The agricultural sector of California faces significant challenges with respect to labor availability, housing, and health and safety during the COVID-19 crisis.",
    "Agricultural workers are recognized as 'essential critical infrastructure workers' during COVID-19 shelter-in-place orders in California.",
    "Farmworkers lack adequate access to COVID-19 testing, which is necessary to protect themselves and the food supply chain.",
    "Many agricultural workers live in overcrowded and unsafe housing conditions.",
    "The average life expectancy of farmworkers is only 49 years, partly due to stress from their living conditions.",
    "Assembly Bill 2164 provides Federally Qualified Health Centers and Rural Health Clinics with tools to implement an e-consult telehealth program.",
    "The e-consult telehealth program aims to grant enhanced access to healthcare providers and specialists for farmworkers and others."
  ]
}
```
